title: eriogonum strictum var. proliferum
intro: Eriogonum strictum var. proliferum, also known as California Buckwheat or Proliferum Buckwheat, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Polygonaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, making it useful for wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of Eriogonum strictum var. proliferum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healthy skin, and support the immune system. Eriogonum strictum var. proliferum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy for human consumption.
